_translated_editions.name: The White Edition
_translated_editions.description: Prepare for a special taste experience! This is the Red Bull White Edition with an exotic coconut and rich blueberry taste.

_translated_editions.name: The Red Edition
_translated_editions.description: The fresh watermelon taste of Red Bull Red Edition. Pink freshness reminiscent of warm lands and time-tested energy.

_translated_editions.name: The Apricot Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Apricot Edition tempts with a perfect combination of apricot and strawberry, complemented by a hint of peach.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull is appreciated by top athletes, busy professionals, university students and travelers on long journeys.

_translated_editions.name: The Blue Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Blue Edition. The classic with a pleasant blueberry taste.

_translated_editions.name: The Winter Edition
_translated_editions.description: The taste of the new Red Bull Winter Edition is juicy Fuji apples with a gently warming ginger hint.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: Wings without sugar: Red Bull Sugarfree is the same Red Bull, just without sugar.

_translated_editions.name: The Yellow Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Yellow Edition. Let the exotic tropical fruit taste surprise you!
